title: Natural-language workflow optimization produces diff proposal
user_goal: As a workflow editor, ask the system to optimize an existing video creation workflow by reducing station count, changing style and adding a safety review Agent.
expected_user_visible_outputs: Agent role / goal / tool / model changes
updated Blueprint / Runtime Report / Evidence Chain refs after confirmation
missing_evidence: user confirmation or valid human authorization evidence
claim_guard_notes: This scenario must not be counted as autonomous workflow editing readiness.
redaction_guard_notes: Future evidence must store redacted refs only and must not include raw workflow payloads or raw prompts.
